title: Action log entry — one line in registry/actions.log.jsonl
description: Append-only record of every action submitted to POST /api/actions. Captures the original manifest plus runtime status, produced layer_ids, and any error. Written as JSONL (one entry per line) for cheap streaming and grep. NEVER edit or delete; supersede with a new action if reprocessing is needed.

error.description: Populated when status='error'. { kind, message, trace }.

runner_logs_path.description: Optional path to runner stdout/stderr capture.
